title: Merge PDF - Zero Upload Client-Side Tool
h1: Merge PDF Files Instantly in Your Browser
description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document using pure client-side WebAssembly. No file uploads, 100% privacy guaranteed, zero limits. Perfect for users in Kyiv.

sections.title: Why use our tool?
sections.content: Experience the fastest and most secure way to process your files directly in your browser using WebAssembly. No data leaves your device.

steps.title: Select Files
steps.description: Drag and drop or select files from your device.

steps.title: Process Locally
steps.description: Your device CPU processes the file securely without internet uploads.

steps.title: Download Instantly
steps.description: Save the output directly to your local storage.

sections.title: Optimized for users in Kyiv, UA-30
sections.content: Whether you are working from a cafe in Kyiv or an office, our offline-first architecture ensures your data remains secure and lightning fast.

sections.title: Absolute Privacy & WASM Security
sections.content: Compliant with enterprise legal privacy requirements (GDPR/HIPAA). No server storage, no data logging.

sections.title: Unmatched Speed
sections.content: Since files are never uploaded to a cloud server, processing time is reduced by 90% compared to traditional cloud aggregators.

faqs.a: Yes! Our tool is 100% free with no daily usage caps, file size limits, or registration required.

faqs.q: Are my private documents uploaded to remote cloud servers?
faqs.a: No. All file processing is executed 100% locally in your browser memory using WebAssembly.
